title: Billing Cycle
body: Billing happens on the first of every month. Customers receive a billing email with the new statement. Late billing payments accrue a small fee.

title: Shipping Policy
body: Shipping rates depend on weight and destination. Domestic shipping arrives in three business days. International shipping requires customs documentation.

title: Returns Window
body: Returns are accepted within thirty days of delivery. Refund processing starts once the returns center receives the parcel. Final-sale items are excluded from returns.

title: Authentication Flow
body: Authentication uses email and password by default. Single-sign-on authentication is available for enterprise tenants. Authentication tokens expire after twenty-four hours.

title: Inventory Tracking
body: Inventory counts update in real time as orders are placed. Low-inventory alerts fire when stock drops below the threshold. Inventory audits run quarterly across every warehouse.

title: Webhook Delivery
body: Webhook events are delivered with at-least-once semantics. Each webhook payload is signed with HMAC SHA256. Failed webhook deliveries retry with exponential backoff.

title: Rate Limit Behaviour
body: Rate limits apply per API key and reset every minute. Exceeding the rate limit returns HTTP 429 with a retry header. Burst rate limits permit short spikes above the steady-state quota.

title: Encryption At Rest
body: Encryption at rest uses AES-256 across all data volumes. Encryption keys rotate automatically on a thirty-day schedule. Customer-managed encryption keys are available on the enterprise plan.

title: Audit Logging
body: Audit logs capture every administrative action. Audit log retention is configurable up to seven years. Audit log exports stream to S3-compatible storage.

title: SCIM Provisioning
body: SCIM provisioning syncs users from the identity provider. SCIM deprovisioning revokes access within five minutes. SCIM endpoints expect bearer-token authentication.

title: Search Filters
body: Search filters narrow result sets by attribute. Range filters support numeric and date fields. Filters combine with boolean AND by default.

title: Cursor Pagination
body: Pagination uses opaque cursors instead of offset. Each pagination response includes a next cursor. Cursor pagination is stable across concurrent writes.

title: Account Quotas
body: Quotas cap monthly indexed documents per workspace. Quota exhaustion pauses ingest but never deletes data. Workspace owners can purchase additional quota at any time.

title: Field Redaction
body: Field redaction removes sensitive content before indexing. Redaction patterns support regular expressions. Audit trails record every redaction event.

title: Data Export
body: Data export emits NDJSON archives signed for integrity. Export jobs run nightly or on demand. Exports include both content and metadata for every chunk.

title: Reranker Stage
body: The reranker stage refines candidates using a stronger model. Reranker scores are not directly comparable to vector scores. Reranker latency is the dominant cost for top-k retrieval.

title: Markdown Chunking
body: Markdown chunking splits content on headings and paragraphs. Chunking preserves heading context in each chunk. Chunk size targets stay below the embedder's context limit.

title: Corpus Manifest
body: Manifest entries track every ingested document. Manifest persistence enables fast list-corpora queries. Manifest reads collapse to the latest entry per document.
